query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-image-2.0-rl technical report" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on general reinforcement learning exploration mechanisms (Value Bonuses with Ensemble errors) and does not address the specific domain of Large Language Models (LLMs), image generation, or the "Qwen-Image-2.0-RL" technical report mentioned in the user's query. While it discusses RL, it lacks the necessary connection to the specific empirical population (LLM/Image-RL) or the specific mechanism of extending the Qwen-Image-2.0 framework required for inclusion in a literature revie
